heroHeadline: Sheinbaum at 548 Days: Plan Michoacán Unveiled, Cuba Oil Defense, AIFA Train Delayed Again
heroSubtitle: President Sheinbaum announced a 57 billion peso 'Plan Michoacán for Peace and Justice' after protests in Uruapan and Morelia. She defended Mexico's right to supply oil to Cuba despite Trump's tariff threat. The Buenavista–AIFA train link missed its Holy Week inauguration target for missing safety certification. Expanded Plan México unveiled at the National Museum of Anthropology. The U.S. Section 301 tariff probe comment period opened, with a Mexican response due April 15. USMCA review talks continue toward the July 1 deadline.
footerNote: Data sourced from Diario Oficial, INEGI, Banco de México, SNSP, Secretaría de Economía, Reuters, AP, El Universal, Reforma, Animal Político, Mexico News Daily, Infobae, Milenio, La Jornada, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, AtlasIntel, USTR, Chatham House, Mexico Business News, El Financiero, La Silla Rota
